response.justification: Strong generalist software engineer with 13+ years of experience, current Staff-level role at Stripe, and some exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators. However, the resume shows limited demonstrated depth in production GenAI systems, RAG architectures, vector databases, or cloud-native AI design — all core requirements. AI work appears recent and peripheral rather than a sustained focus, and there's no explicit evidence of LLM evaluation pipelines, multi-agent frameworks, or customer-facing technical discovery leadership.
strengths: Staff-level title at Stripe with MCP and agentic workflow tooling exposure
13+ years of polyglot full-stack experience including TypeScript and Python-adjacent ecosystems
Track record of mentoring, workshops, and technical leadership across multiple companies
concerns: No explicit experience with vector databases, RAG, or LLM evaluation/observability
Cloud platform experience limited to AWS CDK at Shopify; no GCP/Azure or AI-on-cloud architecture shown
No evidence of customer-facing forward-deployed or technical discovery work with enterprise stakeholders

key_factors.factor: Staff-level seniority with MCP/agentic tooling exposure
No customer-facing forward-deployed delivery track record
